name: RPlog_To_Hire_a_Smuggler_Part_two
title: A Holocall with Captain Vane
summary: Roused from a doze in the Caspian embassy, Ambassador Ambrosia Ad-Delgard takes an incoming holo-transmission from Captain Shiari Vane, a flamboyant Rattataki smuggler responding to word that the Republic needs captains skilled at evading Imperial blockades. Vane, eager and theatrical, confirms her interest in running humanitarian aid -- food, water, medicine, and possibly weapons -- through the Imperial blockade of the starving Caspian worlds. Ambrosia lays out her terms: thirty-five thousand credits up front plus three to five thousand per run, with blockade evasion the captain's own burden. Vane haggles for double the per-run rate, arguing the risk to ship and crew, and Ambrosia agrees to take it to her Naval contacts while keeping a child glimpsed in the background sheltered from view. The two part with the deal nearly struck and a promise to stay in touch.
